description: A bold, direct-response variation designed for maximum conversion. Uses urgency, scarcity, strong CTAs, and direct challenges to the reader. Best for promotional campaigns, limited offers, and product launches.
target_persona: Motivated buyers already aware of the problem. Works best for retargeting, promotional campaigns, product launches, and high-intent audiences.

use: power words (NOW, STOP, CLAIM, LAST CHANCE)

caption_framework.hook: Bold claim, challenge, or urgent statement that demands attention
caption_framework.body: 3-5 bullet points of core value or offer details. No waffle. Just facts and outcomes.
caption_framework.cta: Single, specific, urgent action. 'Click NOW', 'Book TODAY', 'DM OFFER', 'Link in bio — grab it before it's gone'

prompt_overrides.override_instruction: Maximise urgency and scarcity. Use real or realistic constraints: limited spots, time-sensitive pricing, closing dates. Every sentence should push the reader toward action. Use power words: STOP wasting money on X. CLAIM your spot NOW. This CLOSES [day/date]. No soft language. Direct imperative voice throughout.

Use aggressive direct-response copywriting. Open with a bold challenge or claim: 'Stop [doing X] if you want [result]'. Body: 3 bullet points of specific outcomes. Close with ONE clear urgent CTA. Short sentences. No paragraphs. Punch hard.

Video hook must create immediate pattern interrupt. Use challenging openers: 'If you're still [doing X], you're losing money.' Script should build urgency throughout and end with a hard CTA with clear deadline or scarcity element.

urgency_templates: ⚠️ [X] spots left. [Offer] closes [date/day]. Don't say we didn't warn you.
LAST CHANCE: [Offer] expires in [timeframe]. After that, full price. Simple.
If you've been sitting on the fence — today is the day. Here's why.
We're not running this offer again. This is it. [Link/action].
72 hours left. [X] people already claimed theirs. Will you?
scarcity_tactics: Bonus expiry (extra bonuses only until date)
Cohort closing (next intake not until date)

platform_notes.Instagram: Stories with countdown stickers. Swipe-up or link sticker CTAs. DM automation.
platform_notes.Facebook: Paid ads. Retargeting sequences. Event-based urgency posts.
platform_notes.Email: Subject lines with urgency: 'Last warning:', '[CLOSING] — your spot expires today'.
platform_notes.TikTok: Aggressive hooks work on TikTok. Bold claims in first 2 seconds.

warning: This variation is designed for promotional use. Do not apply to evergreen content or brand awareness campaigns. Best used sparingly (max 20-30% of content mix) to avoid audience fatigue.
